scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run imagemin && npm run copyfonts && npm run usemin
scripts.usemin: usemin claudiacontact.html -d dist --htmlmin -o dist/claudiacontact.html && usemin claudiacontactesp.html -d dist --htmlmin -o dist/claudiacontactesp.html && usemin claudiaindex.html -d dist --htmlmin -o dist/claudiaindex.html && usemin claudiaindexesp.html -d dist --htmlmin -o dist/claudiaindexesp.html && usemin claudiaportfolio.html -d dist --htmlmin -o dist/claudiaportfolio.html && usemin claudiaportfolioesp.html -d dist --htmlmin -o dist/claudiaportfolioesp.html
